reply_original: Thank you for your 5-star rating! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying Fantasia. Your support means the world to us! If you have any questions or need help, feel free to reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Keep the magic going!
reply_zh: 感谢您给予5星评价！我们非常高兴听到您喜欢Fantasia。您的支持对我们来说意义重大！如果您有任何问题或需要帮助，请随时联系support@fantachat.ai。让魔法继续吧！
